name: happycodex
description: Reliability workflow for long-running refactors and high-risk Codex changes with acceptance evidence and fresh native review.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable long-task implementation with fresh review
interface.longDescription: Complete long-running refactors, cross-cutting implementations, migrations, and other high-risk Codex changes with one Root writer, an immutable task baseline, durable acceptance evidence, bounded investigation, and fresh native review.
defaultPrompt: Use $happycodex:happycodex with Goal for this compaction-prone migration.
Use $happycodex:happycodex with native and Fable 5 max review when available.
